title: rosa × dumetorum f. cinerosa
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. cinerosa, also known as the Cinereous Dog Rose, is a deciduous shrub belonging to the rose family and is a variant of the Rosa × dumetorum species. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum f. cinerosa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, and even exhibit antiseptic properties. Traditional herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and tinctures made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to create a range of remedies for various health issues.
